Year 299 After the Conquest (299 AC) is a year in the Westerosi calendar, the 299th after Aegon I Targaryen's crowning in Oldtown which maesters and educated people use as a reference to date the years.

299 AC is marked by the War of the Five Kings, and sees major battles of the conflict. During the year, three of the claimants die: Renly Baratheon is killed in his own camp through sorcery, Balon Greyjoy falls to his death from a bridge, and Robb Stark is murdered in the Red Wedding. Stannis Baratheon's options suffer a severe blowback after being defeated at the Battle of the Blackwater, leaving the Lannister-Tyrell alliance as the victors of the war. This alliance is cemented by the betrothal of Joffrey Baratheon and Margaery Tyrell, scheduled for the first day of year 300 AC. Meanwhile, in Essos, Daenerys Targaryen hatches three dragons from petrified dragon eggs.

The final chapters of A Game of Thrones, all chapters from A Clash of Kings, and most chapters of A Storm of Swords take place during 299 AC.

Events[ ]

Conflicts

  • War of the Five Kings
  • Battle on the Green Fork
  • Battle in the Whispering Wood
  • Battle of the Camps
  • Siege of Storm's End by Stannis Baratheon's troops
  • Riots in King's Landing
  • The Battle of Oxcross, the taking of Ashemark, raiding along the westerlands coast, seizure of westerlands gold mines, and the storming of the Crag
  • The Battle of the Fords
  • Fighting at the Stony Shore, Deepwood Motte, Moat Cailin, and Torrhen's Square, and the capture of Winterfell
  • A battle outside the gates of Winterfell followed by the sack of Winterfell and the capture of Torrhen's Square
  • The liberations of Raventree Hall and Stone Hedge
  • The recapture, sack, and siege of Darry
  • A fight at the holdfast in the unnamed Gods Eye town and a battle at the burning septry
  • The fall of Harrenhal
  • The Battle of the Blackwater
  • The Red Wedding
  • The fight at the Fist and the mutiny at Craster's Keep
  • Burning of the House of the Undying in Qarth
  • The sack of Astapor and the battle near Yunkai

Other Events

  • A red comet appears in the sky
  • Dragons are hatched after the last known to Westeros died in 153 AC
  • A small tourney on King Joffrey's name day
  • Autumn begins to descend on Westeros representing the end of a long summer[1]
  • A harvest feast is held at Winterfell

Births[ ]

  • Rhaego, stillborn baby of Drogo and Daenerys Targaryen[2]
  • Dragons are hatched in the Dothraki sea when Daenerys survives Drogo's funeral pyre[3]
    • Drogon[3]
    • Viserion[3]
    • Rhaegal[3]
  • Monster, son of Craster and Gilly[4]

Marriages[ ]

  • The wedding of Renly Baratheon and Margaery Tyrell
  • The wedding of Tyrek Lannister and Ermesande Hayford
  • Donella Hornwood, forced to wed Ramsay Snow
  • The wedding of Roose Bolton and Walda Frey
  • Robb Stark and Jeyne Westerling
  • The wedding of Tyrion Lannister and Sansa Stark
  • Edmure Tully and Roslin Frey at what becomes known as the Red Wedding

Titles and Positions[ ]

King

  • Renly Baratheon is crowned
  • Robb Stark is crowned King in the North and King of the Trident
  • Stannis Baratheon is crowned.
  • Balon Greyjoy styles himself King of the Isles and the North

Queen

  • Margaery Tyrell after her new husband Renly is crowned
  • Daenerys Targaryen declares herself queen
  • Selyse Florent after her husband Stannis is crowned
  • Alannys Harlaw after her husband Balon crowns himself
  • Jeyne Westerling after she marries Robb

Small Council

  • Tyrion Lannister is made acting Hand of the King
  • Tywin Lannister takes over the position of Hand of the King
  • Tyrion Lannister is made/demoted to master of coin
  • Kevan Lannister is made master of laws
  • Mace Tyrell is made master of ships
  • Paxter Redwyne and Mathis Rowan are made councillors on the small council
  • Doran Martell is offered a seat on the small council, but he sends his brother Oberyn Martell to fill it

Lord

  • Petyr Baelish is made Lord of Harrenhal and resigns as master of coin
  • Lancel Lannister is made Lord of Darry
  • Philip Foote is made Lord of Nightsong and given the lands of House Caron
  • Hallyne the Pyromancer is made a Lord
  • Garlan Tyrell receives the lands and castles of House Florent, making him Lord of Brightwater Keep
  • Vargo Hoat declares himself Lord of Harrenhal

Kingsguard

  • Boros Blount is removed from the Kingsguard for cowardice by Cersei Lannister
  • Balon Swann, Osmund Kettleblack, and Loras Tyrell are named to the Kingsguard
  • Boros Blount is reinstated to the Kingsguard by Tywin Lannister

Knighted

  • Gendry is knighted by Beric Dondarrion
  • Lothor Brune, Bronn, Osney Kettleblack, and Osfryd Kettleblack are knighted

Castellan

  • Amory Lorch is named castellan of Harrenhal

Other Titles

  • Ko Pono becomes khal after the death of Khal Drogo
  • Ko Jhaqo becomes khal after the death of Drogo
  • Mago becomes a bloodrider to Jhaqo
  • Aggo, Jhogo, and Rakharo become bloodriders to Daenerys Targaryen
  • A new High Septon is named after the death of the previous in the riots
  • Alester Florent is made Hand of the King to Stannis Baratheon, but is later stripped of the office for treason
  • Davos Seaworth is made Lord of the Rainwood, Admiral of the Narrow Sea, and Hand of the King to Stannis
